sql_array: CREATE TABLE documents (doc_id INT, content TEXT, is_xml BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO documents VALUES (1, 'This is a text document.', FALSE);
INSERT INTO documents VALUES (2, '<root><data>XML Document Content</data></root>', TRUE);
INSERT INTO documents VALUES (3, 'Another text document.', FALSE);
SELECT vt_batch_feed(CONCAT((SELECT content FROM documents WHERE is_xml = TRUE), ' ', (SELECT content FROM documents WHERE is_xml = FALSE))) LIKE '%Document%';
SELECT * FROM documents WHERE content LIKE (SELECT CONCAT('%', 'Another', '%'));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT content FROM documents WHERE content LIKE '%text%') AS t;
SELECT vt_batch_feed('Sample text') WHERE vt_batch_feed('XML <tag>Example</tag>') LIKE '%Example%';
WITH DocumentFeed AS (SELECT vt_batch_feed(content) AS words FROM documents) SELECT words FROM DocumentFeed WHERE words LIKE 'Sample%';
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_documents AS SELECT * FROM documents WHERE doc_id IS NOT NULL;
SELECT vt_batch_feed('Mixed input <data> and regular text') LIKE (SELECT CONCAT('%<data>%'));
SELECT vt_batch_feed(NULL) LIKE 'This will not match' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM documents WHERE doc_id IS NULL) = 0;
